title: Hydrogen Sparks Innovation at Ikosi High School with Sustainable Energy and Digital Learning - FinancialEDGE
description: In a bold step towards sustainability and digital skills empowerment, Hydrogen Payment Services Company Limited (Hydrogen), in collaboration with the Lagos State Ministry of Education, Education DistrictII, has donateda 5KVA solar-powered inverter system to Ikosi Senior High School, Ketu. This innovative initiative provides a clean, renewable energy source dedicated to ensuring sustainable access to clean
html:
In a bold step towards sustainability and digital skills empowerment, Hydrogen Payment Services Company Limited (Hydrogen), in

collaboration with the Lagos State Ministry of Education, Education DistrictII, has donateda 5KVA solar-powered inverter system to Ikosi Senior High School, Ketu.
